repos.name: hashicorp/terraform
repos.description: Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.
repos.descriptionZh: Terraform 使您能够安全且可预测地创建、更改和改进基础设施。它是一个源可用的工具，可将 API 编码为声明性配置文件，这些文件可以在团队成员之间共享、视为代码、进行编辑、审查和版本控制。

repos.name: ansible/ansible
repos.description: Ansible is a radically simple IT automation platform that makes your applications and systems easier to deploy and maintain. Automate everything from code deployment to network configuration to cloud management, in a language that approaches plain English, using SSH, with no agents to install on remote systems. https://docs.ansible.com.
repos.descriptionZh: Ansible 是一个极其简单的 IT 自动化平台，使您的应用程序和系统更易于部署和维护。使用 SSH，以接近简单英语的语言实现从代码部署到网络配置再到云管理的一切自动化，无需在远程系统上安装代理。 https://docs.ansible.com。
